add_metaclassc
Adapterz
Base class for SSL driver library adapters.
    Required methods:
        * ``wrap(sock) -> (wrapped socket, ssl environ dict)``
        * ``makefile(sock, mode='r', bufsize=DEFAULT_BUFFER_SIZE) ->
          socket file object``
    Nc
